title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is an open-source framework that triggers AI coding workflows from multiple platforms including GitHub, Slack, Telegram, and Discord. A new Jira adapter integrates Jira tickets into Archon workflows, allowing automated bug fixes and pull request generation directly from ticket events.
